creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported with changes: 
- Respect CFLAGS (run the config answers through sed) 
- Shorten DESCR 
- Add some @dirrm to PLIST 
- One file (quickref.txt) wasn't being installed, so do that 
- LIB_DEPENDS only for shared libs, change to BUILD_DEPENDS 

Thanks!
